description: Allowlist for CORE-ROUTE-001 direct requireAuthContext route debt. New entries must not be added casually; migrate routes to withAuthContext instead.

entries.reason: Existing route still calls requireAuthContext directly. This is frozen so no new direct-auth route can be added while the route wrapper audit burns down.
entries.plannedAction: Migrate this route to withAuthContext when touched, or replace this allowlist entry with an explicit documented exception including auth type, permission, no-store, route performance, rate-limit/CSRF, and audit/security event rationale.
